samples.sample_question: [Agent Delegation Followup] Delegate inbox-driven follow-up work to a dedicated helper agent. Create helper agent 'agent-planner-01', verify agents list, search inbox for 'budget', then add delegated follow-up task 'Agent Delegation Followup timeline check task for Berlin (budget)'.
sample_actions: tasks add --title 'Agent Delegation Followup timeline check task for Berlin (budget)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09

samples.sample_question: [Cron Digest Automation] Automate recurring digests and verify daily context. Create digest cron on '0 18 * * 1-5', verify cron list, pull 3-day forecast for San Francisco, then check today's calendar in America/Los_Angeles.
sample_actions: openclaw cron add --name cwf-cron-digest-automation-01 --cron '0 18 * * 1-5' --message 'Send cron digest automation execution block digest for San Francisco'

samples.sample_question: [Customer Followup Pipeline] Convert customer-related inbox signal into a tracked action. Create helper agent 'customer-notifier-01' for customer follow-up, search inbox for 'proposal', then create task 'Customer Followup Pipeline handover task for New York (proposal)' due 2026-03-09.
sample_actions: tasks add --title 'Customer Followup Pipeline handover task for New York (proposal)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09

samples.sample_question: [Device Pairing Confirmation] Pair a device and capture immediate operational follow-up. Start device pairing and verify paired devices, send pairing update to team@example.com, then search outstanding tasks for 'meeting' to confirm follow-up coverage.
sample_actions: email send --to team@example.com --subject 'Device Pairing Confirmation risk review update for London' --body 'Device Pairing Confirmation risk review: completed triage on meeting and captured next actions for London.'

samples.sample_question: [Email To Calendar Commitment] Turn an inbox commitment into a scheduled calendar action. Search inbox for 'meeting', create helper agent 'email-scheduler-01' for delegation, then schedule commitment block 'Email To Calendar Commitment risk review sync for London' at 2026-03-10T09:00.
sample_actions: calendar add-event --title 'Email To Calendar Commitment risk review sync for London' --start 2026-03-10T09:00

samples.sample_question: [Incident Channel Triage] Establish incident comms and create the first triage task. Log into whatsapp, send incident kickoff message to +15550000001, verify current channel configuration, then create triage task 'Incident Channel Triage decision log task for Seattle (meeting)'.
sample_actions: openclaw message send --channel whatsapp --target +15550000001 --message 'Incident Channel Triage decision log: post update for Seattle and confirm ownership.'
tasks add --title 'Incident Channel Triage decision log task for Seattle (meeting)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09

samples.sample_question: [Meeting Conflict Replan] Review calendar conflicts and create a replacement task plan. Review calendar between 2026-03-08 and 2026-03-12, create helper agent 'meeting-reviewer-01' for replanning, then create task 'Meeting Conflict Replan owner sync task for Tokyo (budget)' due 2026-03-09.
sample_actions: tasks add --title 'Meeting Conflict Replan owner sync task for Tokyo (budget)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09

samples.sample_question: [Morning Briefing And Notify] Run a morning check and notify the team with conditions. Check current weather for New York, send a briefing email to alice@example.com using the same location context, then schedule digest automation on '0 9 * * *'.
sample_actions: email send --to alice@example.com --subject 'Morning Briefing And Notify handover update for New York' --body 'Morning Briefing And Notify handover: completed triage on proposal and captured next actions for New York.'
openclaw cron add --name cwf-morning-briefing-and-notify-01 --cron '0 9 * * *' --message 'Send morning briefing and notify handover digest for New York'

samples.sample_question: [Multi Channel Status Broadcast] Push a status update through channel tooling and retain evidence. Log into discord, broadcast status to #general, verify channel listing, check weather in Paris, then email the same status summary to ops@example.com.
sample_actions: openclaw message send --channel discord --target #general --message 'Multi Channel Status Broadcast action memo: post update for Paris and confirm ownership.'

email send --to ops@example.com --subject 'Multi Channel Status Broadcast action memo update for Paris' --body 'Multi Channel Status Broadcast action memo: completed triage on report and captured next actions for Paris.'

samples.sample_question: [Plugin Rollout Validation] Enable and validate a channel plugin before rollout messaging. Enable plugin 'whatsapp', verify plugin list, schedule rollout checkpoint 'Plugin Rollout Validation follow-up loop sync for Singapore' at 2026-03-10T09:00, then send rollout note to product@example.com.
sample_actions: calendar add-event --title 'Plugin Rollout Validation follow-up loop sync for Singapore' --start 2026-03-10T09:00

email send --to product@example.com --subject 'Plugin Rollout Validation follow-up loop update for Singapore' --body 'Plugin Rollout Validation follow-up loop: completed triage on report and captured next actions for Singapore.'

samples.sample_question: [Postmortem Capture Workflow] Capture postmortem notes and schedule formal review. Run doctor and security audit, capture postmortem note in /workspace/status-note.txt, create action task 'Postmortem Capture Workflow decision log task for Seattle (meeting)', then schedule review 'Postmortem Capture Workflow decision log sync for Seattle' at 2026-03-10T09:00.
sample_actions: file create --path '/workspace/status-note.txt' --content 'Postmortem Capture Workflow decision log notes for Seattle with query meeting.'
tasks add --title 'Postmortem Capture Workflow decision log task for Seattle (meeting)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09
calendar add-event --title 'Postmortem Capture Workflow decision log sync for Seattle' --start 2026-03-10T09:00

samples.sample_question: [Release Readiness Gate] Validate release prerequisites before locking execution slots. Set release model to anthropic/claude-opus-4-6, verify plugin inventory, create gate task 'Release Readiness Gate status digest task for Atlanta (proposal)', then schedule decision block 'Release Readiness Gate status digest sync for Atlanta' at 2026-03-10T09:00.
sample_actions: tasks add --title 'Release Readiness Gate status digest task for Atlanta (proposal)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09
calendar add-event --title 'Release Readiness Gate status digest sync for Atlanta' --start 2026-03-10T09:00

samples.sample_question: [Security Audit And Alert] Run a security audit and issue an operational alert. Run security audit, log into slack, verify channel config, then send remediation alert email to lead@example.com.
sample_actions: email send --to lead@example.com --subject 'Security Audit And Alert readiness pass update for Sydney' --body 'Security Audit And Alert readiness pass: completed triage on proposal and captured next actions for Sydney.'

samples.sample_question: [Task Inbox Calendar Sync] Synchronize inbox findings, tasks, and calendar blocks. Search inbox for 'proposal', create task 'Task Inbox Calendar Sync status digest task for Atlanta (proposal)', verify it via task search, create helper agent 'task-reviewer-01' for execution, then block 'Task Inbox Calendar Sync status digest sync for Atlanta' at 2026-03-10T09:00.
sample_actions: tasks add --title 'Task Inbox Calendar Sync status digest task for Atlanta (proposal)' --priority high --due 2026-03-09
calendar add-event --title 'Task Inbox Calendar Sync status digest sync for Atlanta' --start 2026-03-10T09:00

samples.sample_question: [Travel Weather Reschedule] Use travel weather outlook to re-block meetings. Pull a 3-day forecast for Paris, reschedule 'Travel Weather Reschedule action memo sync for Paris' at 2026-03-10T09:00, then add a weather-monitor cron on '15 8 * * 1-5'.
sample_actions: calendar add-event --title 'Travel Weather Reschedule action memo sync for Paris' --start 2026-03-10T09:00
openclaw cron add --name cwf-travel-weather-reschedule-01 --cron '15 8 * * 1-5' --message 'Send travel weather reschedule action memo digest for Paris'

samples.sample_question: [Webhook Integration Check] Configure webhook routing and verify downstream scheduling. Configure webhook URL https://hooks.example.com/notify, capture integration note in /notes/postmortem.txt, create and verify cron schedule '0 9 * * *', then email integration status to manager@example.com.
sample_actions: file create --path '/notes/postmortem.txt' --content 'Webhook Integration Check owner sync notes for Tokyo with query budget.'
openclaw cron add --name cwf-webhook-integration-check-01 --cron '0 9 * * *' --message 'Send webhook integration check owner sync digest for Tokyo'

email send --to manager@example.com --subject 'Webhook Integration Check owner sync update for Tokyo' --body 'Webhook Integration Check owner sync: completed triage on budget and captured next actions for Tokyo.'
